hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, subprocess; data=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); r=subprocess.run(['git','diff','HEAD@{1}','HEAD','--name-only','--','.claude/rules/','.claude/commands/'],capture_output=True,text=True) if 'git pull' in cmd else None; files=r.stdout.strip() if r else ''; print('{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️ RULES CHANGED — restart session now. Changed files:\\n' + files.replace(chr(10), '\\n') + '\"}') if files else None"
